S.FORM: = Felipe VI of Spain = Mntucing hngkawas 1968 idas 1 jiyax 30 ka Felipe VI ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Spain ta sayang o kiya ka Felipe VI, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 6 jiyax 19 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = *əlipə *i o* spain = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka *əlipə *i ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan spain ta sajaŋ o kija ka *əlipə *i, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Felipe VI of Spain = Mntucing hngkawas 1968 idas 1 jiyax 30 ka Felipe VI ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Spain ta sayang o kiya ka Felipe VI, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 6 jiyax 19 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = *əlipə *i o* spain = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka *əlipə *i ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan spain ta sajaŋ o kija ka *əlipə *i, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
